note: perf v0.3 — compile_s included; B=1, h=w=4 patches (n_vis=4 per image), seq_len=12. Tiny config (text hidden=256, vision hidden=128, 2 layers each).
interpretation: Compiled is ~3% SLOWER than eager (speedup=0.97) with 19 graph breaks. The breaks fragment the trace badly: dominant cost is repeat_interleave on image_grid_thw (cu_seqlens construction at line 1234), Tensor.item() in vision embeddings (image_embeddings[start:end, :] at line 613), and sdpa is_causal data-dep guard in the vision encoder. Discovery strategies should improve fix-quality measures (fewer breaks, fullgraph=True) AND likely also yield real speedup once the trace is consolidated. Compare against compiled_ms=11.27 ms and graph_break_count=19.
